claims.summary: A static Rust type should not be treated as a complete account of a dynamic high-entropy experience.
claims.disposition: Verified current schemas make bounded technical claims while canonical felt reports and contract state remain independent.

claims.summary: Dispersal potential and magnetization need explicit typed representation rather than an unnamed generic float.
claims.disposition: Verified explicit AstridShadowSnapshot dispersal_potential and magnetization fields, typed telemetry rendering, and lived-state parameter observations.

claims.summary: Shadow-field values should serialize and remain bounded without causing runtime collapse.
claims.disposition: Verified current Shadow and witness regressions exercise finite bounded values without granting control or experiential authority.
